reviews.review_description: Fun breakout type game to kill some time. Controls work pretty well. Kind of holding an air hockey like paddle to hit the ball. Plenty of levels and some can be pretty hard. If you like the old school break out type games, I think you would like this one. Plenty of variety of levels to keep you busy for a while. Fun game to pick up as you start a VR session or to end the night with.

reviews.review_title: Update: dev listened and fixed the issue
reviews.review_description: Very addictive and fun game and now at a lower price too! Just buy it.

I was browsing and came across this demo.  It's a VR combo of Araknoid and Air Hockey.  The teaser video looked interesting and I gave it a try.  Well done across the board.  And did I say it was a lot of fun?  How about addicting?

This is such a fun idea and it plays really really well. Not only is there a air hockey/breakout hybrid, which is superb on its own, but there's a air hockey only game with powerups! This can't be released quick enough!!!

I grew up in arcades in the 80s and Arkanoid was one of my favorite games.  I've been curious how that concept could be applied to VR and this demo satisfies that curiosity.  I think with some polishing up this could be very popular.  Things like the shading and lighting could be improved, maybe more bright neon colors for eye candy.  I will probably buy the full game after I play the demo some more, though.  I worked up a little bit of a sweat after playing for about 20 minutes.  Would love to be able to use both hands somehow.

One note: On stage 2 of Unbreakable, when the ball was small, it managed to squeeze into the back area and got stuck there bouncing around endlessly.  Then I tried to reflect the tower's bullets to destroy it but when I managed to get a direct hit, there was no damage happening.  I had to restart the level after 3 or 4 minutes.  Next try took me 30 seconds or so.
This game is so much fun well I mean demo so please make this 58 year old Grandma happy by releasing this as a playable game to buy!! 👌
